title: Message
description: A message in the conversation. Uses the industry-standard role + content format (D16: use the prevailing standard, not a custom protocol). Messages flow through the Gateway API, the Gateway-Engine contract, and the Provider API — the same shape everywhere.

role.description: The role of the message sender. system: Bootstrap prompt from configuration. user: Human or external client message. assistant: Previous model response (may include tool_calls). tool: Tool execution result returned to the model.

content.description: The textual content of the message. The system is content-agnostic — text, images, audio, video, files are all valid content types (D59).

id.description: Unique identifier for this tool call

name.description: Name of the tool to call

arguments.description: Arguments for the tool call, matching the tool's parameter schema

tool_calls.description: Tool calls made by the assistant. Present only when role is 'assistant' and the model decided to call tools. The Engine executes these and returns results as tool-role messages.

tool_call_id.description: When role is 'tool', identifies which tool call this result corresponds to. Matches the id from a previous assistant tool_calls entry.
